history.text: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.

```json
{
  "nsfw": false,
  "confidence": 0,
  "label": "safe"
}
```
The image displays screenshots from a mobile game, likely Garena Free Fire. The first and second panels show the player's inventory and character customization options, including fashion items, emotes, skill skins, and backpacks. The third panel focuses on weapon skins, specifically showcasing the M1887 (CUSTOM) shotgun with its various visual appearances. There is no nudity, pornographic, or suggestive content present in these images. The text visible primarily relates to game elements like currency (3375), levels (LV.1, LV.2, LV.3), item names (e.g., "Jacket SEA Games", "M1887 (CUSTOM)"), and weapon statistics. A phone number, "+62 819-7393-8143", is overlaid on the second panel.
